info.name: SchoolSavvy API Collection
info.description: A complete collection of API endpoints for the SchoolSavvy School Management System

item.name: Authentication

exec: console.log('School Admin token saved to environment');
console.log('No token found in the response');

request.description: Login for school administrators

exec: console.log('No token found in the response');

request.description: Login for teachers and staff members

exec: console.log('Super Admin token saved to environment');
console.log('No token found in the response');

request.description: Login for super administrators
Register a new school in the system

item.description: Endpoints for user authentication and registration

request.description: Get the profile of the currently authenticated school
Update the profile of the currently authenticated school
List all schools (super admin only)
Get a specific school by ID (super admin only)
Get the profile of the currently authenticated user
Update the profile of the currently authenticated user
Change the password of the currently authenticated user
Create a new teacher
Get all teachers for the current school
Get a specific teacher by ID
Update a specific teacher
Delete a specific teacher
Create a new student
Get all students for the current school
Get a specific student by ID
Update a specific student
Delete a specific student
Create a new class
Get all classes for the current school
Get a specific class by ID
Update a specific class
Delete a specific class
Get all students enrolled in a specific class
Create a new subject
Get all subjects for the current school
Get a specific subject by ID
Update a specific subject
Delete a specific subject

item.name: Calendar Management

exec: console.log('Academic Year ID saved to environment');

request.description: Create a new academic year
Get all academic years for the current school

body.raw:
{
    "title": "Annual Sports Day",
    "description": "Annual sports competition for all students",
    "start": "2023-09-15T09:00:00Z",
    "end": "2023-09-15T17:00:00Z",
    "allDay": false,
    "category": "sports",
    "isPublic": true,
    "location": "School Playground"
}

request.description: Create a new calendar event
Get all calendar events within a date range
Get public calendar events within a date range (no authentication required)

item.description: Endpoints for managing the school calendar

item.name: Fee Management

exec: console.log('Fee Structure ID saved to environment');

request.description: Create a new fee structure
Get all fee structures for the current school
Create a new fee record for a student
Record a fee payment for a student
Get fee payment history for a specific student

item.description: Endpoints for managing fees and payments

item.name: Gallery Management

request.description: Create a new album in the gallery
Get all albums in the gallery
Upload media (image/video) to an album
Get all media in a specific album
Get all public albums (no authentication required)

item.description: Endpoints for managing the school gallery

item.name: Roles and Permissions

request.description: Get all available permissions in the system
Create a new role with specific permissions
Get all roles for the current school
Assign a role to a specific user
Get all permissions assigned to the current user

item.description: Endpoints for managing user roles and permissions

request.description: Get dashboard data for school administrators
Get dashboard data for teachers
Get dashboard data for super administrators
Get all fee structures for the school
Create a new fee structure
Get a specific fee structure by ID
Update an existing fee structure
Delete a fee structure
Get all student fees with optional filtering
Get student fees with filtering options
Assign a fee structure to a student
Record a payment for student fees
Apply late fees to overdue installments
Get fee details for a specific student and academic year
Generate receipt for a specific payment
Update an installment (for waiving fees, adjusting amounts)
Get finance summary and statistics

request.description: Mark attendance for an individual student
Get attendance report for a specific student with date range
